Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}N-No thanks. Maybe next time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry... I guess I'm just not in the mood. I'm not sure how to explain it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like there's something[n]on Yukari's mind...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I want her to open up to me,[n]I need to work on my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If I were {f 4 31 1 6 1 0}, she might be[n]willing to talk to me about her problems...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}...Could we maybe take some time to talk?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems that, because of my {f 4 30 1 1 1 0},[n]Yukari thinks I look reliable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This might be my chance[n]to get to know her better...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}So, uh... can we go to the rooftop?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1042 0 0}Thanks, I wanted to talk to you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}All right, let's go then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, okay... Maybe some other time, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are you walking back by yourself? I'll come with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems Yukari wants[n]to walk home with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, um... Do you have some time right now? I'd like to talk things out with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school with Yukari?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then, can we go to the rooftop?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 1 0}Do you... wanna come to my room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 1 0}Well... Wanna come to my room?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1053 0 0}Oh, are you busy? Well, maybe some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}If you've got something to say, then spit it out already.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, I guess I was kinda harsh, too. Sorry for acting that way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe we can go somewhere together like before...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us made up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should be able to invite her[n]out the next time I'm free...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}I get the feeling you don't really mean it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Yukari still won't open up to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I might have to try talking to her over a few[n]days before I can mend our relationship.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}...I thought you had nothing to say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}I'm here for you too, so don't forget that, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 1 0}If someone sees us, they'll start spreading rumors.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with Yukari...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}Great, time for some window shopping! I wonder what's on display today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm okay now. I've got you and the rest of the team with me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}And we're all here for you too. Don't forget that, okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}You're not actually keeping your problems bottled up, are you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1095 0 0}If you ever need help, you can always count on us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with Yukari...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, are you heading home now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}...Could we maybe take some time to talk?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are you walking back by yourself? I'll come with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}H-Hey, about the other day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, um... Do you have some time right now? I'd like to talk things out with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1009 0 0}Oh, hey, {f 4 1}-kun. Looks like we're finally done with exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}That's a load off our shoulders, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}Man, I'm beat from all that studying, and I'm sure you are, too. Let's give ourselves a pat on the back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Whew, we can finally relax now. Let's give ourselves a pat on the back and take a breather.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}Great! Why don't we head somewhere fun?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, right... There's this place I wanted to check out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}Help me pick out something nice, would you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1075 0 0}If you're heading out, do you wanna stop by Paulownia Mall together on the way home?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, hey! If you're leaving, do you wanna stop by Paulownia Mall together on the way home?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wanna have a quick little shop trip first, then check out the music store...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1001 0 0}I was thinking of dropping by Paulownia Mall today. Wanna join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking of dropping by Paulownia Mall today. Wanna join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Was there anywhere you wanted to stop by? Maybe we could get some tea first, then go shopping after?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1009 0 0}Hey there. You heading home now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking of swinging by the strip mall just now. Wanna join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, are you heading home now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was thinking of swinging by the strip mall just now. Wanna join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm not really in the mood for ramen... What else can we get to eat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I spent all of lunch cleaning up for the archery team, so I didn't have time to eat anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll stop by Wakatsu or something on the way home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}I felt so swamped with work today...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}I spent all of lunch cleaning up for the archery team, so I didn't have time to eat anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe I'll stop by Wakatsu or something on the way home...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1131 0 0}Haha, thanks. It feels kinda weird eating by myself, you know?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}All right, let's get going! Hmmm, what should I order...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1002 0 0}Are you heading home? I was thinking of going out somewhere first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, are you heading home? I was thinking of going out somewhere first.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm... Let's head to Paulownia Mall then. There were a few things I wanted to check out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 1 0}Um... I was hoping that you had the time to talk right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh... Are you heading home?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 1 0}Um... I was hoping that you had the time to talk right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}This isn't the best place for that though... Let's go to the roof.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Are you busy right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}It's nothing important, but... there's something I need to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Are you busy right now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}It's nothing important, but... there's something I need to tell you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Let's go to the roof. Sorry, I'll try to make this quick.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm about to head home. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_061_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 11 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, by the way, I'm about to head home. What about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm gonna stop by Paulownia Mall on the way home. Wanna join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}I'm gonna stop by Paulownia Mall on the way home. Wanna join me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_166_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1020 0 0}Oh, that's too bad. See you later, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_167_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1009 0 0}Oh, all right then. I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_168_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1020 0 0}Oh, are you busy? Maybe next time, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_169_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1021 0 0}Oh, bad timing, I guess. See you later, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_170_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}Sorry, I guess it was pretty sudden. I'll see you later, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_171_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1020 0 0}Oh, that's too bad. Maybe next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_172_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1020 0 0}Oh, you already had plans? Maybe next time, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_173_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1110 0 0}Oh... Maybe next time, then. I'll see you later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_174_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1020 0 0}Even though I gathered up the courage to invite you... Oh well, maybe next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_175_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1020 0 0}Oh, did you already have plans? Maybe next time, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_176_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1009 0 0}Oh, okay. I'll just see you at the dorm, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_177_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 -1 -1 0 0}Wh-What? I think we're done for today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}...Maybe some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_178_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1021 0 0}Okay, I'll see you at the dorm. Feel free to talk to me at any time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EVENTPLAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Message issued by the script. [n]{f 1 5 0}Comm Event Replay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_PERSPNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що наші стосунки можуть стати міцнішими завдяки[n]Персоні {f 2 4 2}, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 5}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю нерозривний зв'язок[n]з {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю нерозривний зв'язок[n]з літнім подружжям...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_RAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що незабаром можу стати[n]ближче до {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_RANKUP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що незабаром можу стати ближчим[n]до літнього подружжя...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_NOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Не думаю, що наш зв'язок[n]стане міцнішим, навіть якщо я проведу[n]більше часу з {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_NORMAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Не думаю, що наш зв'язок[n]стане міцнішим, навіть якщо я проведу[n]більше часу з ними...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю нерозривний зв'язок[n]з {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені все ще проводити з ними час?..[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_AS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені проводити час після[n]школи з {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_DT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести[n]день з {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND__GENERAL_MSG_NET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто проводити час граючи в [n]ММОРПГ з {f 2 4 0}...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_NT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести вечір[n]з {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести час[n]після школи з {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_FASHION_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести час[n]після школи в гуртку моди?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести день[n]в книжковому магазині?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести день[n]в книжковому магазині?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Чи варто мені провести час[n]після школи з {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Оскільки я отримав найвищий бал на іспитах, я ще й отримав {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Оскільки я отримав найвищий бал на іспитах, я ще й отримав {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Оскільки я отримав найвищий бал на іспитах, я ще й отримав {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Захоплює, як ти продовжуєш досягати успіхів у навчанні, водночас ведучи важкі сутички.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання шкільної роботи та нашої... гм, "позакласної діяльності".[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати іспиту. Гарна робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Захоплює, як ти продовжуєш досягати успіхів у навчанні, водночас ведучи важкі сутички.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Я принесла тобі подарунок, щоб віддячити за твою наполегливу працю. Ось, візьми.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Оскільки я отримав найвищий бал на іспитах, я ще й отримав {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}
